title: Flavorful Mediterranean Fish Pilaf
description: A pungent and savory pescatarian dish featuring braeburn apples and katsuramuki-cut fish, perfect for a post-workout meal, cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Prepare the bamboo steamer by filling the bottom with 2 inches of water and bringing it to a boil.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced apples, crumbled feta cheese, and chopped parsley.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, and minced garlic.
Add the brown rice to the bowl with the olive oil mixture and stir until the rice is well coated.
Place the katsuramuki-cut fish fillets on a plate or tray that fits inside the bamboo steamer.
Add the apple and feta mixture on top of the fish fillets.
Place the plate or tray with the fish and apple mixture inside the bamboo steamer.
Steam the fish and apple mixture for 12 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Serve the fish and apple mixture over the brown rice and garnish with additional parsley if desired.
